name: J1939ILResetManipulatedMessage
title: J1939ILResetManipulatedMessage
syntax: long J1939ILResetManipulatedMessage( dword pgn, dword destinationAddress, qword filterMask, qword filterValue ); // form 1
description: Resets the change of a single J1939ILManipulateMessage call. The corresponding message is specified by PGN, destination address and a part of the first eight data bytes.

parameters.name: pgn
parameters.description: Use same value as in J1939ILManipulateMessage to stop manipulation of the message.

return: -1: There is no matching entry made by J1939ILManipulateMessage
